gaming.descriptor: Vertical short-form composition with bold center-framed subjects occupying most of the frame, shallow depth of field isolating figures against blurred or simplified backgrounds, saturated pop-palette dominated by yellows, blues, greens, and hot pinks, dynamic action poses with exaggerated energy and motion, clean bright ambient lighting with occasional dramatic rim or stage lighting, playful and high-energy mood, cartoonish or toy-like environmental textures contrasting with realistic human subjects, wide-angle slight distortion, punchy contrast, vivid chromatic saturation pushed beyond naturalism

magazine.descriptor: Vertical portrait-oriented composition with a bright central subject isolated against simple or blurred backgrounds, high-contrast vibrant color grading with saturated warm tones dominating the palette, shallow depth-of-field pulling focus sharply to a single foreground element, bold graphic red accent arrows or shapes used as visual direction devices, split-panel layout with darkened zoomed flanking panels framing a crisp central strip, dramatic close cropping of subjects, cinematic color grading with golden and amber warmth, punchy saturated hues against muted surroundings, candid yet staged energy with heightened emotional intensity

vlog.descriptor: Vertical portrait-oriented composition with a blurred zoomed-in panel flanking each side of the central subject, warm and saturated indoor lighting with occasional natural daylight, subjects positioned centrally at mid-torso to head framing, shallow depth of field separating foreground subjects from cluttered lived-in domestic backgrounds, candid and expressive energy with high color vibrancy, rich jewel tones and earth tones dominating the palette, slightly overexposed highlights giving a bright airy feel in some frames while others retain moody ambient warmth, triptych-style split framing device creating cinematic width, casual handheld aesthetic with a sense of spontaneous real-life capture

tech.descriptor: Vertical portrait-oriented composition with strong center-weighted framing, split-screen or stacked panel layouts dividing the frame horizontally, vivid saturated accent colors contrasting against neutral or dark backgrounds, bold shallow depth-of-field isolating foreground subjects with soft blurred surroundings, dramatic close-up macro framing emphasizing texture and detail, high-contrast lighting with clean artificial illumination, punchy complementary color pairings of red and green or teal and orange, clinical informational mood balanced with dynamic visual energy, bright product-forward presentation against controlled studio-style backgrounds, restless layered depth created by overlapping scaled elements, sharp central focus pulling attention to a single hero subject or object
